channel.title: Breakthrough Medicine
channel.description: The breakthroughs changing medicine right now. Clinical trials, new treatments, and what is coming next.
channel.itunes:author: Media Verticals
channel.author: mediaverticals@proton.me (Media Verticals)
channel.itunes:summary: The breakthroughs changing medicine right now. Clinical trials, new treatments, and what is coming next.

item.title: future_medicine Daily Brief — March 30, 2026
item.description:
Hello, and welcome. Let's dig into what's happening in medicine and longevity science right now, because there's something genuinely important shifting in how we think about aging — and it's moving from theory into something you can actually measure and potentially intervene on.
Let me start with t...
item.itunes:author: Media Verticals
item.author: mediaverticals@proton.me

item.title: future_medicine Daily Brief — March 28, 2026
item.description:
Welcome back. We're looking at the future of medicine today, and honestly, there's a moment happening right now that I think deserves your full attention.
Let me start with the thing that's caught everyone's eye this week, because it's the kind of signal that doesn't announce itself as a major infl...
item.itunes:author: Media Verticals
item.author: mediaverticals@proton.me

item.title: future_medicine Daily Brief — March 24, 2026
item.description: Welcome back. We're going to walk through what's happening in medicine right now, and I think you're going to see why this moment feels different. There's a genuine inflection point forming—not just incremental progress, but compression happening across multiple dimensions at once. That's what I wan...
